description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a prominent covered front porch supported by multiple columns, giving it a classic and inviting appearance. The structure features a mix of large and small windows, with some arranged in symmetrical rows and others placed asymmetrically, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is primarily a dark, low-pitched gable style, with a flat-roofed section over a sunroom or patio area at the rear. The house includes a partially enclosed courtyard or garden space visible from above, as well as a glass-covered patio or sunroom extension. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The main entryway is accentuated by steps leading up to the porch, flanked by columns and protected by the roof overhang.
description: A single-story house with a large covered front porch, gable roof, and a mix of large and small windows. Features include a sunroom, courtyard, and a prominent entryway with columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch with columns, main entryway, and a glimpse of the courtyard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat-roofed sunroom/patio area and large open backyard space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the glass-covered patio, multiple windows, and the courtyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, secondary entry points, and the porch from a different angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, multiple columns, and a roof overhang, creating a welcoming and sheltered entrance.
